headline: How Investors May Respond To GEHC’s bkActiv Integration With Medtronic’s Stealth AXiS Navigation System
summary: GE HealthCare announced that its bkActiv intraoperative ultrasound system is now digitally integrated with Medtronic’s FDA-cleared Stealth AXiS surgical navigation platform, offering real-time imaging during cranial procedures and set to be showcased at the May 2026 AANS Annual Scientific Meeting. This integration could make bkActiv a more seamless “plug-and-play” option for neurosurgeons, potentially deepening GE HealthCare’s role in advanced surgical imaging workflows. Next, we’ll assess...

headline: China Diabetes Devices Market Forecast and Company Analysis Report 2026-2034 Featuring Roche, Abbott Laboratories, Novo Nordisk, BD, Medtronic, Eli Lilly, and Sanofi
summary: The China Diabetes Devices Market is projected to grow from USD 7.19 billion in 2025 to USD 14.51 billion by 2034, marking a CAGR of 8.11% from 2026 to 2034. This growth is driven by a surge in diabetes prevalence, enhanced healthcare infrastructure, and the adoption of advanced glucose monitoring and insulin devices.
